title: odin #5604
definition:
1) the pain of childbirth, travail pain, birth pangs
 2) intolerable anguish, in reference to the dire calamities
    precede the advent of the Messiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) the pain of childbirth, travail pain, birth pangs
 2) intolerable anguish, in reference to the dire calamities
    precede the advent of the Messiah

    NASB:  a birth pang:
